        initString
      • initString(val: SomeInteger; base: uint8 = 10): String

Bindings for the Arduino String class (WString.h) and related types.

The Arduino String is a heap-allocating, mutable string class backed by a NUL-terminated char buffer on the free store. On small AVR targets it is prone to heap fragmentation; prefer fixed-size char buffers (readBytes/readBytesUntil) when memory is tight.

Compiler note (from WString.h): the following avr-gcc flags can dramatically improve performance and RAM efficiency for code using this class, typically with little or no increase in code size:

-felide-constructors
-std=c++0x

Types

FlashStringHelper {.importcpp: "__FlashStringHelper", header: "WString.h",
                    incompleteStruct, byref.} = object
Opaque handle for a string stored in program memory (flash/PROGMEM). Obtained via the F() macro. 
String {.importcpp: "String", header: "WString.h".} = object
The Arduino String class. Heap-allocating and fragmentation-prone on small targets; prefer caller-owned buffers (readBytes/readBytesUntil) when memory is tight.

Procs

proc c_str(s: String): cstring {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                                 tags: [], forbids: [].}
Direct pointer to the internal NUL-terminated buffer. Valid only as long as the String is not modified or destroyed. 
proc charAt(s: String; index: cuint): char {.importcpp, header: "WString.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc compareTo(s: String; other: String): cint {.importcpp, header: "WString.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Lexicographic compare: <0, 0, or >0.

    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc F(s: cstring): ptr FlashStringHelper {.importc: "F", header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Places a string literal in flash (PROGMEM) and returns a pointer suitable for passing to String/print overloads that accept FlashStringHelper. Only meaningful with compile-time string literals. 
proc getBytes(s: String; buf: ptr uint8; bufsize: cuint; index: cuint = 0) {.
    importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Copies up to bufsize bytes of the String (from index) into buf.

    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc indexOf(s: String; str: String; fromIndex: cuint): cint {.importcpp,

proc initString(): String {.importcpp: "String()", constructor,
                            header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                            forbids: [].}
Empty string (zero length, allocated). 
proc initString(c: char): String {.importcpp: "String((char)#)", constructor,
                                   header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                   forbids: [].}
Single character. 
proc initString(cstr: cstring): String {.importcpp: "String(@)", constructor,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Copy from a NUL-terminated C string. 
proc initString(s: ptr FlashStringHelper): String {.importcpp: "String(@)",
    constructor, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Copy from a PROGMEM string (F() result). 
proc initString(s: String): String {.importcpp: "String(@)", constructor,
                                     header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                     forbids: [].}
Copy constructor. 
proc initString(val: cdouble; decimalPlaces: uint8 = 2): String {.
    importcpp: "String((double)(#), (unsigned char)(#))", constructor,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Double formatted to decimalPlaces digits after the point. 
proc initString(val: cfloat; decimalPlaces: uint8 = 2): String {.
    importcpp: "String((float)(#), (unsigned char)(#))", constructor,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Float formatted to decimalPlaces digits after the point. 
proc isValid(s: String): bool {.importcpp: "((#) ? true : false)",
                                header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                forbids: [].}
True when the String holds a valid (allocated) buffer. Use if myStr.isValid: to check for allocation success.

    importcpp: "#.lastIndexOf((char)#)", header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    importcpp: "#.lastIndexOf((char)#, #)", header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc lastIndexOf(s: String; str: String; fromIndex: cuint): cint {.importcpp,

proc len(s: String): cuint {.importcpp: "#.length()", header: "WString.h",
                             ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Alias for length — Nim convention. 
proc length(s: String): cuint {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                                tags: [], forbids: [].}
Current number of characters (excluding the NUL terminator). 
proc remove(s: var String; index: cuint) {.importcpp, header: "WString.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc remove(s: var String; index: cuint; count: cuint) {.importcpp,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc replace(s: var String; find: char; replaceWith: char) {.
    importcpp: "#.replace((char)#, (char)#)", header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc replace(s: var String; find: String; replaceWith: String) {.importcpp,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc reserve(s: var String; size: cuint): bool {.importcpp, header: "WString.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Pre-allocate internal buffer to at least size bytes. Returns true on success; on failure the string is unchanged. reserve(0) on an invalid string makes it valid (empty). 
proc setCharAt(s: var String; index: cuint; c: char) {.
    importcpp: "#.setCharAt(#, (char)#)", header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc startsWith(s: String; prefix: String): bool {.importcpp,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc startsWith(s: String; prefix: String; offset: cuint): bool {.importcpp,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc substring(s: String; beginIndex: cuint): String {.importcpp,
    header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc substring(s: String; beginIndex: cuint; endIndex: cuint): String {.
    importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc toCharArray(s: String; buf: cstring; bufsize: cuint; index: cuint = 0) {.
    importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Same as getBytes but typed for a char buffer. 
proc toDouble(s: String): cdouble {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                                    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parses the String as a double. Returns 0.0 on failure. 
proc toFloat(s: String): cfloat {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parses the String as a floating-point number. Returns 0.0 on failure. 
proc toInt(s: String): int32 {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                               tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parses the String as a decimal integer. Returns 0 on failure. 
proc toLowerCase(s: var String) {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc toUpperCase(s: var String) {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc trim(s: var String) {.importcpp, header: "WString.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                           forbids: [].}

template initString(val: SomeInteger; base: uint8 = 10): String
Integer formatted in the given base (default decimal). Use DEC (10), HEX (16), OCT (8), or BIN (2).

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-07-23 03:03:10 UTC
